texto: 139, inciso III, "a", 1 e 2, "c", 1 a 6, e "d", 1 e 2; e art. 140, incisos IX e X. Revogação: art. 11, incisos II, "d", IV, "f", e VI; art. 18, inciso II, "d"; art. 19, inciso XII; art. 21, inciso V, "a" e "b"; art. 36, inciso I, "b"; art. 42, incisos III e V; art. 99, inciso I, "a", 3 e 4; art. 101, inciso VI; art. 105, inciso VI; art. 116, insico I, "d"; art. 119, incisos III, "b", e IX, "b", "d" e "e"; art. 124, inciso I, "b", 1, 2 e 3; e art. 139, inciso IV, "c", 2. title: Exibe Normativo
